updateNote: Day 81 (11:07 PM PDT May 18 / 06:07 UTC May 19): Hezbollah fires ~200 rockets at northern Israel — 1 killed, 14 injured in Nahariya (largest single Hezbollah barrage of war). IDF strikes 30+ Hezbollah sites in southern Lebanon. Lebanon: 687 killed + 1,774 wounded in past 24h. Oil whipsaws: Brent spiked to $112 on false Iran sanctions waiver report (Tasnim), dropped to $107.78 after US denial. Trump 'Clock is Ticking — TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE!' NSC held. Gulf states' 48-72h pause window running. Pezeshkian: 'Dialogue does not mean surrender.' Brent $107.78 (+35.1%), WTI $107.35 (+42.2%). Gas $4.515. Hormuz Blockade Day 78.
dataFreshnessWarning: Last updated 11:07 PM PDT on May 18, 2026 (Day 81)
